summary: Comprehensive testing of integrated signup + ID verification flow. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 signup/verification flow steps working correctly with proper UI states.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates account and returns JWT token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with valid credentials
Backend: POST /api/verification/submit accepts passport without back of ID
Backend: POST /api/verification/submit accepts driving license with optional back
Backend: POST /api/verification/submit requires both id_front and selfie
Backend: GET /api/verification/status returns user verification status
Backend: GET /api/auth/me accessible without verification (skip flow works)
Backend: Admin login works with provided credentials
Frontend: Step 1 - Signup form (name, email, phone, password) + Continue button
Frontend: Step 2 - ID type selection (Passport, UK Driving Licence, National ID Card)
Frontend: Step 2 - 'Skip for now' button redirects to homepage with toast
Frontend: Step 3 - ID upload with front required, back hidden for passport
Frontend: Step 3 - ID upload shows back optional for driving license
Frontend: Step 3 - Continue button disabled until ID front uploaded
Frontend: Progress indicator shows completed steps with green checkmarks
Frontend: User logged in after signup (avatar visible in header)
Frontend: Login flow works with admin credentials
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is well organized with clear step progression
Proper use of data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
AI face verification via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY + GPT-5.2 vision is working
Good UX: Continue button disabled until required fields uploaded
Proper conditional rendering: back of ID hidden for passport, shown for driving license

test_credentials.test_users: Created multiple test users during testing with pattern testuser_*@test.com / Password123!

seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during backend pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Integrated signup + ID verification flow is complete. Steps: 1) Form (name/email/phone/password) → 2) ID type selection (passport/driving_license/national_id with skip option) → 3) Upload ID (front required, back optional for non-passport) → 4) Selfie upload → 5) Result (verified/rejected/pending). AI uses GPT-5.2 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.

mocked_apis.email_service: MOCKED - Email service via Resend not configured. AI face verification is REAL using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY.

step1_signup_form.validation: Password min 8 chars enforced on frontend

step2_id_type_selection.skip_option: Available - redirects to homepage with toast

step4_selfie.details: Tips provided: face camera directly, good lighting, no sunglasses
